title: Backend health endpoint responds
description: Verify backend root/health endpoint returns success.

title: Login with valid student loginId credentials
description: Verify POST /api/auth/login returns auth token/session for student using loginId UJAAS-2026-007 and password ashish@123.
steps: POST /api/auth/login with loginId UJAAS-2026-007 and password ashish@123
Assert success response and auth token/cookie fields

title: Authenticated profile endpoint
description: Verify /api/auth/me returns current user after login with loginId UJAAS-2026-007 and password ashish@123.
steps: Login with loginId UJAAS-2026-007 and password ashish@123 to obtain auth context
Assert user role and identity payload
